summary: Excellent soundboard recording captures a smoking‑hot early ’69 performance highlighted by a fiery Dark Star and Jerry’s onstage Ice House comment.
review: The reviewers rave about the pristine sound quality, calling it excellent, and describe the show as “smoking hot,” even noting Jerry’s spontaneous remark at the start of Dark Star. Although the set is short (1 hr 24 min), fans of early‑69 material will appreciate its high energy and historic vibe.

ai_rating.rationale: A single detailed five‑star review praises both the musical performance and recording quality, indicating an exceptional show with excellent soundboard audio.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes the sound is excellent with clear, crisp audio and no reported issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Very short (1 hr 24 min) set that still delivers high energy; fans note the early‑69 vibe despite limited length.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Spontaneous Ice House comment at Dark Star’s onset and strong playing noted.
